subcodes.first_line: O Zaynu'l-'Abidin! Upon thee be the Glory of God, the Lord of all worlds. We have desired to make mention of thee at this moment [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا زین العابدین علیک بهاءالله رب العالمین انا اردنا ان نذکرک فی هذا الحین
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @praise and encouragement, @chastisement and requital, @consolation and comfort
